content.full_text:
FEB-20-1992 10:10 FROM -916-225-5189 TO 913272026 P.02

[COUNTY OF SHASTA SEAL]
SHASTA COUNTY
BOARD OF SUPERVISORS

1815 Yuba Street
Suite 1
Redding, CA 96001
(916) 225-5557
(800) 479-8009
(916) 225-5189-FAX

K. MAURICE JOHANNESSEN, DISTRICT 1
BOB BOSWORTH, DISTRICT 2
FRANCIE SULLIVAN, DISTRICT 3
MOLLY WILSON, DISTRICT 4
PATRICIA A. "IRISH" CLARKE, DISTRICT 5

February 20, 1992

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel
California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

Historically county officials, particularly County Supervisors, have attended the National Association of Counties (NACO) annual convention in Washington, D.C. This year it is from February 27 through March 4, 1992.

Due to lack of travel funds in the county's budget, expenses for Supervisor Francie Sullivan's trip have been offered by the Associated California Loggers (ACL).

Please clarify, in writing, the conversation of February 19 between Supervisor Sullivan and John Wallace confirming that this reimbursement for expenses is acceptable.

We apologize for the late request, but this opportunity has just become available. We would appreciate a response as soon as possible.

Sincerely,

Francie Sullivan, District 3

by: [signature]
Pat O'Brien, A.A.

FS/plo
